trends.headline: How the Iran war is hurting travelers, airline industry
trends.summary: Europeans may have to reconsider their summer travel plans, as a jet fuel shortage triggered by the blockade of the Strait of Hormuz could lead airlines to set higher ticket prices.

trends.headline: US to withdraw thousands of troops from Germany
trends.summary: The decision to cut US troops comes amid rising tensions after German Chancellor Friedrich Merz said the US was being "humiliated" by Iran's leadership.

trends.headline: Kosovo to hold snap elections in June
trends.summary: Kosovo will soon hold its third parliamentary election in a year and a half. Prime Minister Albin Kurti was able to form a government in February, but now there's political deadlock over who should be elected president.

trends.headline: Fifth Circuit blocks mailing of abortion pill nationwide
